channel.title: Intro on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Intro on Zymacs

item.title: My first post with hugo
item.description: Dumped blogger I set up a site on blogger and dumped it for a hugo design that caught my eye. I thought I could learn some css building it myself but CSS is boring so I was like, I could as well learn hugo. The best way to learn something is to play with it.
